T1.label: Public
T1.description: Information intended for public consumption. No harm if disclosed; may already be published or required to be publicly available.

T2.label: Internal
T2.description: Operational information for staff and authorized volunteers. Low harm if accidentally disclosed, but not intended for public release.

T3.label: Confidential
T3.description: Sensitive organizational or personal data. Moderate-to-significant harm if disclosed, including reputational damage, loss of donor trust, or regulatory concern.

T4.label: Restricted
T4.description: Highest sensitivity data. Disclosure could cause severe harm including legal liability, regulatory penalties, threat to personal safety, or identity theft.

categories.name: Donor & Funder Data
categories.description: Information related to individual donors, institutional funders, and fundraising activities

dataTypes.name: Published donor lists (annual report, honor roll)
dataTypes.rationale: Explicitly published with donor consent

dataTypes.name: Fundraising campaign totals and public goal progress
dataTypes.rationale: Aggregate totals shared publicly to encourage giving

dataTypes.name: Donor name and giving history/totals
dataTypes.rationale: Individual giving data is confidential; disclosure could embarrass donors or invite solicitation

dataTypes.name: Donor contact information (address, phone, email)
dataTypes.rationale: Personal contact data requires protection under privacy best practices

dataTypes.name: Donor payment method, credit card, and ACH/bank data
dataTypes.rationale: Financial account data; breach causes direct financial harm and regulatory liability

dataTypes.name: Wealth screening and capacity scores
dataTypes.rationale: Proprietary fundraising intelligence; disclosure damages donor trust and competitive position

dataTypes.name: Donor communication preferences and opt-outs
dataTypes.rationale: Personal preferences linked to identifiable individuals

dataTypes.name: Major gift solicitation strategies and cultivation plans
dataTypes.rationale: Internal fundraising strategy; disclosure undermines donor relationships

dataTypes.name: Planned giving and estate/bequest documentation
dataTypes.rationale: Legal and financial documents with high sensitivity; involves estate planning and testamentary intent

dataTypes.name: 501(c)(4) donor identity and Schedule B data
dataTypes.rationale: Legally protected from public disclosure; Supreme Court precedent on donor privacy (Americans for Prosperity v. Bonta)

dataTypes.name: Lapsed donor reason codes and exit survey data
dataTypes.rationale: Linked to identifiable donors; may contain sensitive feedback about the organization

dataTypes.name: Funder LOIs, grant agreements, and award letters
dataTypes.rationale: Contractual documents with confidentiality expectations from funders

dataTypes.name: Funder relationship notes and meeting records
dataTypes.rationale: Internal strategy notes; disclosure could damage funder relationships

dataTypes.name: Anonymous donor identity records
dataTypes.rationale: Donor explicitly requested anonymity; disclosure violates donor intent and trust

categories.name: Program Participant / Client / Beneficiary Data
categories.description: Information about individuals served by the organization's programs and services

dataTypes.name: Aggregated program outcomes and impact statistics
dataTypes.rationale: De-identified aggregate data published in reports and grant applications

dataTypes.name: Program descriptions and service offerings
dataTypes.rationale: Public information used for outreach and funder communications

dataTypes.name: Client name and contact information
dataTypes.rationale: Personally identifiable information; many clients are from vulnerable populations

dataTypes.name: Client intake forms and demographic data
dataTypes.rationale: Contains PII and potentially sensitive demographic information collected during enrollment

dataTypes.name: Client SSN or government-issued ID numbers
dataTypes.rationale: Highest-risk PII; enables identity theft if disclosed

dataTypes.name: Client immigration status and documentation
dataTypes.rationale: Disclosure could lead to deportation, family separation, or physical danger

dataTypes.name: Client mental health records and diagnoses
dataTypes.rationale: Protected health information with severe stigma risk if disclosed

dataTypes.name: Client substance use treatment records
dataTypes.rationale: Federally protected with stricter rules than general health data

dataTypes.name: Client HIV/AIDS status and related records
dataTypes.rationale: Specially protected health data; state laws impose additional confidentiality requirements

dataTypes.name: Client domestic violence records and shelter location
dataTypes.rationale: Disclosure poses direct physical safety risk to survivors

dataTypes.name: HMIS client records (Homeless Management Information System)
dataTypes.rationale: Federally regulated data system with strict privacy and security standards

dataTypes.name: Client financial data (income, benefits, debts)
dataTypes.rationale: Sensitive personal financial information collected for service eligibility

dataTypes.name: Client case notes and service interactions
dataTypes.rationale: Detailed notes on client circumstances; may contain sensitive disclosures

dataTypes.name: Client legal records (court orders, probation, custody)
dataTypes.rationale: Legal records with severe consequences if improperly disclosed

dataTypes.name: Client benefit enrollment and eligibility records
dataTypes.rationale: Contains PII and financial eligibility data; linked to government programs

dataTypes.name: Client education records and academic history
dataTypes.rationale: Education records protected by federal law when collected from educational institutions

dataTypes.name: Identifiable client photos and video
dataTypes.rationale: Visual identification of program participants; requires explicit consent for use

dataTypes.name: De-identified participant data for reporting
dataTypes.rationale: Stripped of direct identifiers but still operational data not intended for public release

dataTypes.name: Research data with participant PII
dataTypes.rationale: Research data linked to identifiable participants; subject to IRB protocols and consent agreements

categories.name: Employee & HR Data
categories.description: Personnel records, employment data, and human resources information

dataTypes.name: Staff directory (name, title, work email)
dataTypes.rationale: Basic work contact info shared internally; not published externally by default

dataTypes.name: Published leadership bios and headshots
dataTypes.rationale: Intentionally published on website and in materials

dataTypes.name: Employee Social Security numbers
dataTypes.rationale: Highest-risk PII; enables identity theft and tax fraud

dataTypes.name: Employee date of birth
dataTypes.rationale: PII element used in identity verification; combined with other data enables fraud

dataTypes.name: Employee home address and personal contact information
dataTypes.rationale: Personal information not needed by most staff; safety concern for some roles

dataTypes.name: Payroll records and individual compensation data
dataTypes.rationale: Highly sensitive; disclosure causes organizational disruption and individual harm

dataTypes.name: Performance reviews and disciplinary records
dataTypes.rationale: Confidential employment records; disclosure could lead to legal claims

dataTypes.name: Medical records and disability accommodation requests
dataTypes.rationale: Protected health and disability information with strict legal requirements

dataTypes.name: Background check and criminal history results
dataTypes.rationale: Highly sensitive; regulated by FCRA and state ban-the-box laws

dataTypes.name: I-9 employment eligibility and immigration verification
dataTypes.rationale: Contains citizenship/immigration data; federally regulated retention and access requirements

dataTypes.name: EEO demographic and self-identification data
dataTypes.rationale: Sensitive demographic data collected for compliance; must be kept separate from personnel files

dataTypes.name: Benefit enrollment and dependent information
dataTypes.rationale: Contains PII of employees and their family members including health plan selections

dataTypes.name: Termination documentation and severance agreements
dataTypes.rationale: Confidential employment records; may contain legal terms and release agreements

dataTypes.name: Workplace incident and injury reports
dataTypes.rationale: Contains medical information and details of workplace events; potential legal implications

categories.name: Financial Data
categories.description: Organizational financial records, budgets, accounts, and fiscal reporting

dataTypes.name: Published Form 990 and schedules
dataTypes.rationale: Required to be publicly available; accessible on GuideStar/Candid and IRS databases

dataTypes.name: Audited financial statements (published)
dataTypes.rationale: Typically shared with funders and public; often required for transparency

dataTypes.name: Annual budget (board-approved summary)
dataTypes.rationale: Internal governance document; not public but low harm if disclosed

dataTypes.name: Detailed line-item budget with variance reports
dataTypes.rationale: Reveals operational strategy, cost structure, and financial performance details

dataTypes.name: Chart of accounts and general ledger detail
dataTypes.rationale: Granular financial data revealing transaction-level organizational spending

dataTypes.name: Vendor contracts, pricing, and terms
dataTypes.rationale: Confidential commercial terms; disclosure could harm negotiating position

dataTypes.name: Banking account numbers and routing information
dataTypes.rationale: Direct financial access credentials; disclosure enables wire fraud and theft

dataTypes.name: Investment accounts and portfolio details
dataTypes.rationale: Sensitive financial strategy information; may include account identifiers

dataTypes.name: Endowment details and restricted fund allocations
dataTypes.rationale: Donor-restricted funds with specific terms; disclosure may violate donor agreements

dataTypes.name: Payroll runs with individual employee compensation
dataTypes.rationale: Contains individual salary, deductions, and banking info; highly sensitive

dataTypes.name: Accounts payable and accounts receivable detail
dataTypes.rationale: Reveals vendor relationships, payment terms, and cash flow details

dataTypes.name: Grant financial reports and expenditure tracking
dataTypes.rationale: Funder-specific financial data; may be subject to confidentiality terms in grant agreements

dataTypes.name: Tax filings beyond Form 990 (state, payroll, 1099s)
dataTypes.rationale: Contains sensitive organizational and individual financial data

dataTypes.name: Credit card and purchasing card account data
dataTypes.rationale: Financial account data subject to PCI-DSS; disclosure enables fraud

categories.name: Legal & Governance Data
categories.description: Corporate governance, legal affairs, regulatory compliance, and board records

dataTypes.name: Articles of incorporation
dataTypes.rationale: Public record filed with the state; freely available

dataTypes.name: IRS determination letter (tax-exempt status)
dataTypes.rationale: Required to be available for public inspection; confirms exempt status

dataTypes.name: Board member names and published bios
dataTypes.rationale: Publicly listed on website and Form 990; transparency requirement

dataTypes.name: Board meeting minutes (public portions)
dataTypes.rationale: General governance record; non-sensitive portions shared with stakeholders

dataTypes.name: Executive session board minutes
dataTypes.rationale: Covers personnel actions, litigation, and other privileged matters; attorney-client privilege may apply

dataTypes.name: Bylaws
dataTypes.rationale: Governance framework document; sometimes shared with funders and regulators

dataTypes.name: Conflict of interest disclosures
dataTypes.rationale: Contains personal financial interests of board and staff; sensitive but required for governance

dataTypes.name: Litigation files and legal correspondence
dataTypes.rationale: Attorney-client privileged; disclosure could severely harm legal position

dataTypes.name: Contracts with vendors, partners, and funders
dataTypes.rationale: Confidential commercial and programmatic terms; may contain termination and liability clauses

dataTypes.name: Insurance policies and coverage details
dataTypes.rationale: Reveals coverage limits and organizational risk profile; useful to bad actors

dataTypes.name: Regulatory filings (state charity registration)
dataTypes.rationale: Filed with state regulators; generally accessible but not proactively published

dataTypes.name: Whistleblower complaints and investigation files
dataTypes.rationale: Legally protected communications; disclosure could endanger complainants and obstruct investigations

dataTypes.name: Intellectual property filings and trademarks
dataTypes.rationale: Some filings are public but strategy and pending applications are confidential

dataTypes.name: Merger, acquisition, or dissolution documents
dataTypes.rationale: Premature disclosure could derail negotiations, harm staff morale, and trigger regulatory issues

categories.name: Communications & Advocacy Data
categories.description: Marketing, public relations, advocacy, and stakeholder communications

dataTypes.name: Published press releases and media statements
dataTypes.rationale: Intentionally distributed to the public and media

dataTypes.name: Marketing materials and brochures
dataTypes.rationale: Designed for public distribution to promote programs and services

dataTypes.name: Published social media content
dataTypes.rationale: Posted on public platforms for broad consumption

dataTypes.name: Email newsletter subscriber lists
dataTypes.rationale: Contains PII of supporters; subject to anti-spam and privacy regulations

dataTypes.name: Advocacy and grassroots contact lists
dataTypes.rationale: Identifies individuals by political activity and interests; sensitive in advocacy context

dataTypes.name: Lobbying contact records and meeting logs
dataTypes.rationale: Documents political relationships; some subject to lobbying disclosure laws

dataTypes.name: Advocacy strategy and campaign planning documents
dataTypes.rationale: Internal strategy; premature disclosure undermines campaign effectiveness

dataTypes.name: Draft policy positions and talking points
dataTypes.rationale: Internal working documents; not yet approved for external distribution

dataTypes.name: Coalition partner lists and relationship maps
dataTypes.rationale: Internal coordination information; not confidential but not publicly shared

dataTypes.name: Media contact lists and journalist relationships
dataTypes.rationale: Internal communications resource; not sensitive but operationally valuable

dataTypes.name: Crisis communications plans and messaging
dataTypes.rationale: Internal response strategy; disclosure undermines crisis management capability

dataTypes.name: Social media account credentials and admin access
dataTypes.rationale: Authentication credentials; compromise enables impersonation and reputational damage

categories.name: Grant & Proposal Data
categories.description: Grant applications, proposals, funder reports, and related compliance documentation

dataTypes.name: Published grant awards and amounts
dataTypes.rationale: Often announced publicly by funders and recipients; listed on 990s

dataTypes.name: Program narratives submitted to funders
dataTypes.rationale: Describes programs in detail; not public but not highly sensitive

dataTypes.name: Pending grant proposals (not yet awarded)
dataTypes.rationale: Contains competitive strategy and budget details; premature disclosure disadvantages the organization

dataTypes.name: Grant budgets submitted to funders
dataTypes.rationale: Reveals cost structure, staff compensation, and indirect rates

dataTypes.name: Grant reports submitted to funders
dataTypes.rationale: Contains outcome data and financial reporting; subject to funder confidentiality expectations

dataTypes.name: Funder prospect research and cultivation strategies
dataTypes.rationale: Internal fundraising intelligence; disclosure damages competitive position

dataTypes.name: Declined proposals and funder feedback
dataTypes.rationale: Internal learning data; funder feedback may be provided in confidence

dataTypes.name: Grant agreement and contract terms
dataTypes.rationale: Binding legal documents with confidentiality provisions

dataTypes.name: Subaward and subcontract agreements
dataTypes.rationale: Contains partner financial terms and compliance obligations

dataTypes.name: Federal grant compliance documentation (OMB Uniform Guidance)
dataTypes.rationale: Audit-sensitive records required for federal funding compliance

dataTypes.name: Proprietary program models and logic models
dataTypes.rationale: Intellectual property representing organizational methodology and innovation

dataTypes.name: Human subjects research protocols (IRB-approved)
dataTypes.rationale: Contains protocols for research involving human participants; strict regulatory oversight

categories.name: Volunteer Data
categories.description: Information about volunteers including recruitment, screening, and service records

dataTypes.name: Volunteer roster (name and role, internal use)
dataTypes.rationale: Basic internal coordination data; not published externally

dataTypes.name: Volunteer contact information (address, phone, email)
dataTypes.rationale: Personal contact data requiring privacy protection

dataTypes.name: Volunteer application and screening records
dataTypes.rationale: Contains personal information submitted during application process

dataTypes.name: Volunteer background check results
dataTypes.rationale: Criminal history and screening results; regulated by FCRA with strict access and disposal requirements

dataTypes.name: Volunteer hours and service activity logs
dataTypes.rationale: Operational tracking data; low sensitivity but not publicly shared

dataTypes.name: Volunteer reference letters and recommendations
dataTypes.rationale: Confidential assessments of individuals; disclosure could harm relationships

dataTypes.name: Minor volunteer records and parental consent forms
dataTypes.rationale: Data about children requires heightened protection; parental consent obligations

dataTypes.name: Volunteer certifications and training completion records
dataTypes.rationale: Administrative records tracking qualifications; low sensitivity

dataTypes.name: Volunteer emergency contact information
dataTypes.rationale: Personal information about volunteers and their contacts; needed for safety but must be protected

categories.name: Case Management Data
categories.description: Records from direct service delivery, case management systems, and client-facing interventions

dataTypes.name: Case numbers and client IDs (non-identifying)
dataTypes.rationale: Internal identifiers without PII; used for operational tracking

dataTypes.name: Case intake and assessment records
dataTypes.rationale: Contains detailed personal circumstances, needs assessment, and eligibility data

dataTypes.name: Service plans and goal-setting documentation
dataTypes.rationale: Individualized plans containing personal goals, barriers, and strategies

dataTypes.name: Progress notes and case narrative records
dataTypes.rationale: Detailed documentation of client interactions, progress, and setbacks

dataTypes.name: Crisis intervention records
dataTypes.rationale: Documents acute safety situations; may contain suicidal ideation, abuse disclosures, or imminent danger details

dataTypes.name: Safety plans (DV, suicide, child abuse)
dataTypes.rationale: Contains safety strategies and location information; disclosure directly endangers lives

dataTypes.name: Referral records and inter-agency communications
dataTypes.rationale: Contains client information shared between providers; subject to consent requirements

dataTypes.name: Client consent and release of information forms
dataTypes.rationale: Legal documents governing information sharing; contain client signatures and PII

dataTypes.name: Case closure and discharge records
dataTypes.rationale: Documents outcomes, reasons for closure, and aftercare plans

dataTypes.name: Child welfare and mandated reporting records
dataTypes.rationale: Legally privileged reports involving child safety; strict confidentiality requirements

dataTypes.name: Housing placement and tenancy records
dataTypes.rationale: Contains address and housing status information for vulnerable populations

dataTypes.name: Benefits navigation and enrollment assistance records
dataTypes.rationale: Documents eligibility determinations and applications for public benefits

categories.name: Research Data
categories.description: Program evaluation, research studies, surveys, and analytical data

dataTypes.name: Published research reports and white papers
dataTypes.rationale: Intentionally published for public consumption and thought leadership

dataTypes.name: Survey data (aggregated and de-identified)
dataTypes.rationale: Statistical summaries with no individual identification; safe for public sharing

dataTypes.name: Survey data with individual respondent identification
dataTypes.rationale: Responses linked to identifiable individuals; consent typically limits use

dataTypes.name: Focus group and interview transcripts (identified participants)
dataTypes.rationale: Verbatim statements linked to named individuals; may contain sensitive opinions

dataTypes.name: Human subjects research data with PII
dataTypes.rationale: Subject to IRB oversight, informed consent requirements, and federal research regulations

dataTypes.name: Proprietary evaluation frameworks and assessment tools
dataTypes.rationale: Organizational intellectual property; competitive advantage in program design

dataTypes.name: Unpublished research findings and draft analyses
dataTypes.rationale: Pre-publication data; premature release could be misleading or damage credibility

dataTypes.name: Vendor and tool evaluation data
dataTypes.rationale: Internal procurement research; low sensitivity but not intended for vendors or public

dataTypes.name: Program evaluation contracts and scope of work
dataTypes.rationale: Contractual terms with evaluators; may contain proprietary methodology and pricing
